summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge, close, label, comment, or fix PR mutation is recommended because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof, and two Telegram PRs are explicitly waiting on author or have failing checks.

actions.reason: Small and plausible, but merge cannot be recommended without complete comment/review-bot hydration, Codex /review proof, and resolved mergeability.
Useful-looking contributor PR, but the broad gateway/daemon/status surface and incomplete review preflight require maintainer review before merge or repair planning.
Blocked by waiting-on-author status, unstable merge state, and failing checks; artifact does not prove a narrow automated repair path.
Plausible channel-scoped fix, but merge cannot be recommended without complete comment/review-bot hydration, Codex /review proof, and mergeability confirmation.
Delivery-sensitive PR is explicitly waiting on author and lacks complete merge preflight proof.

needs_human: #90537: maintainer review for broad daemon/gateway/status delta.
#90586: author/maintainer resolution for waiting status, unstable merge state, and failing checks.
#83161: author/maintainer resolution for waiting status and message-delivery risk.
